Argentina plays Spain in the Final match of the FIFA World Cup at New York New Jersey Stadium. Spain secured a 2-0 shutout over France to advance to the finals. Lionel Messi assisted the winning goal in Argentina's 2-1 victory over England.

Argentina meets England in a semi-final match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Argentina overcame Switzerland 3-1, Lautaro Martínez scored the final goal to seal the win. Jude Bellingham scored a brace in England's 2-1 victory over

Argentina plays Egypt in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Argentina beat Cabo Verde 3-2 behind Lionel Messi's 20th World Cup goal, while Egypt defeated Australia 4-2 on penalties, sealed by Hossam Abdelmaguid.<b
